item.title: irishracing: irishracing.com @irishracing · 20min Irish Grand National winner 'Soldier in Milan' and Two Time Aintree Grand National
item.description: irishracing.com @irishracing · 20min Irish Grand National winner 'Soldier in Milan' and Two Time Aintree Grand National winner 'I Am Maximus' posing for photos at the Homecoming this evening in Leighlinbridge 316

item.title: RacingTV: Racing TV @RacingTV · 21min Two 10/1 chances and a 9/1 fancy appeal to @nevisondave on day one of the Coral Scottish G
item.description:
Racing TV @RacingTV · 21min Two 10/1 chances and a 9/1 fancy appeal to @nevisondave on day one of the Coral Scottish Grand National Festival
#TakeTimeToThink racingtv.com Friday tips: Dave Nevison marks your card at Ayr Our top tipster shares his three best bets on the first day of the Coral Scottish Grand National Festival, with every race live on Racing TV. 2 1 mil

item.title: RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 21min A field of 21 runners and riders will go to post for the Coral Scottish Grand National
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 21min A field of 21 runners and riders will go to post for the Coral Scottish Grand National
Get the full lowdown from our team of tipping experts in our extensive runner-by-runner guide De racingpost.com 3 1 mil

item.title:

@Franmberry casts his eye over the r
item.description:
Sporting Life Racing @SportingLife · 34min "...her mark of 78 looks exploitable"
@Franmberry casts his eye over the recent action in Ireland and flags up half a dozen eyecatchers worth keeping on side in the coming weeks De sportinglife.com 1 1 529
